name: Blushing Antipasto
recipeInstructions:
1. To make marinade, in a jar, combine V-8 juice, salad oil, vinegar, and Italian dressing mix; shake well.
2. In a bowl, combine vegetables.
3. Pour the marinade over all the vegetables.
4. Marinate in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours, stirring occasionally.
Note: If not going to be eaten on the same day, it may work best to wait to add mushrooms and cucumbers until a few hours before serving—this will help them retain their crisp texture. The marinade can be prepared up to a couple of days in advance and stored in the refrigerator.
If you prefer, you can marinate tightly covered in the bowl, then when ready to use, turn it upside down, give it a gentle shake, and return it to the refrigerator.
